---
title: "Decode"
---

The `decode` module turns raw UKB field IDs and integer-encoded categorical
values into analysis-readable names and labels.

## Scope

| Function | Role |
|---|---|
| `decode_values()` | Convert categorical integer codes to labels |
| `decode_names()` | Rename UKB field ID columns to snake_case names |

## Workflow Role

The recommended order is `decode_values()` first, then `decode_names()`.
Value decoding needs field IDs in the original column names, while name
decoding makes the final analysis table easier to read.

## Review Focus

- metadata directory validation;
- cache keys that respect metadata location;
- warnings for very long generated column names;
- preserving input table class and row order.
